questions.question:
The simplex method is so named because

(GATE CSE 1987)
options:
B.

It is based on the theory of algebraic complexes.

C.

The simple pendulum works on this method.

D.

No one thought of a better name.
questions.correct_answer:
B.

It is based on the theory of algebraic complexes.
